act_now.title: Zig Pipeline Report BLOCKED — mcp.publish_skills Is Off
act_now.detail: Zig's Friday pipeline report for Jan can't run. mcp.publish_skills is set to false in G-Brain config. Without it, Zig can't access hubspot or atlassian MCP tools. No HubSpot deal pulls. No Confluence reads. No pipeline data. The daily sales automation Steve and Jan set up this week is dead in the water. Zig posted in #sales_revenue-ninjas June 26.
act_now.action: Run: gbrain config set mcp.publish_skills true. Then tell Zig to retry the Friday report. One minute.

act_now.title: ESC-10 Proposal — Deadline Is TODAY. No Confirmation It Was Sent.
act_now.detail: The workspace still says 'In progress' with every checklist item unchecked. No transcript, no G-Brain update, no Slack confirmation. Steve was active today doing infrastructure and agent work — no signal the proposal was finished and sent. If it's done, kill this. If not: send whatever exists tonight. Even a 2-page skeleton beats radio silence on deadline day. ESC-10 follow-up is July 29.
act_now.action: Send whatever exists tonight. Perfection is the enemy — this was supposed to be a 'react-to-this' draft.

act_now.title: Garland $140K — 3 Days. Jodi DM Still Unconfirmed.
act_now.detail: June 30 is Monday. No evidence Jodi Duron's email to Dr. Rick Lopez was sent. The Moak Casey lever is sitting there — she agreed in May to make the intro after Steve's Michael Ruiz debrief. That debrief happened. Nobody followed up. $140K deal expires in 3 days.
act_now.action: DM Jodi tonight or tomorrow morning: 'Jodi — we debriefed, and I'd love you to put in the word with Dr. Lopez now. Garland's quote deadline is Monday and Michael's been hard to reach.'

act_now.title: CONTRADICTION: Zig's Target Is $1.5M/Aug 1. Yours Is $1M/Sept 1.
act_now.detail: Still unresolved since June 25. Zig's weekly report references '$1.5M Commit by Aug 1.' Steve's strategy brief says '$1M by Sept 1.' Two different targets, two different deadlines. The team may be classifying deals based on the wrong goal.
act_now.action: Clarify in #sales_revenue-ninjas: 'Canonical target is $1M by Sept 1.' Or confirm $1.5M/Aug 1 is real and update the strategy brief.

act_now.detail: July 15 is hard. Board consent must be drafted and signed by all 5 board members. Patrick permanently loses vesting credit if this doesn't execute by July 15.
act_now.action: Email or call Scale Firm. Confirm board consent resolution is drafted. Escalate to Charlie if not.

intel.title: HB 1605 — Maynard/Hickman Amendment (TEC §26.0062): Locally-Selected Literary Works Posting Mandate
intel.pattern: SBOE final vote June 26, 2026. Amendment requires districts/charters to post locally-selected literary works on website before school year, organized by grade. Whole-group instruction trigger. Bridges SB 13 library framework (§33.024) into classroom compliance. If adopted: new transparency mandate = new market surface.
intel.applies_to: Play 1 (SB 13 Compliance) + Play 2 (Collection Benchmarking). Product: automatic posting verification. Marketing: 'did you know this is coming?' angle. Sales: expansion play within existing accounts. Confluence tracking page: /spaces/CH/pages/158597121. Cron checks daily at 8am until confirmed. July 15 checkpoint scheduled.
intel.priority: High — confirm vote outcome, then Nero/Northy strategy session
